The '''''Tempest''''' was [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera|Mika the Hutt's]] customized [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battlecruiser]] and served as the base for his attempts to process the [[Tempest (spice)|spice of the same name]]. Mika embezzled funds from various [[Anjiliac]] clan holdings to finance the ship's construction in secret. Its hull and keel were constructed years previously to house the processing machinery, but Mika was unable to complete the ship until the trade in Tempest expanded, shortly before the death of Mika's sire, [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto|Popara the Hutt]].

''Tempest'' was considered to be weak compared to the ships of a true [[Navy/Legends|navy]], but tough enough to threaten any [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], or patrol ship she encountered. In time, Mika planned to use it as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] for his criminal empire.

The custom-built battle cruiser was 900 meters long. It was valued at 40,000,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. It required a crew of 800 and could carry 1,600 passengers, 8,100 metric tons of cargo, and four years' worth of consumables. It had a class 2 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and a class 15 backup hyperdrive. The ship was equipped with [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], 16 [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], 20 point-defense [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], 8 heavy [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], and 12 [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors.

==Appearances==
*[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']]
*''[[Tempest Feud]]'' {{1st}}
